a260711p1.summary: Elliott Investment Management has built a large stake in car-insurance software provider CCC Intelligent Solutions Holdings Inc. …
a260711p1.title: Sources: activist investor Elliott has built a large stake in car insurance software maker CCC, which is exploring a potential sale and has a ~$3.5B market cap (Bloomberg)

a260711p10.summary: An evolutionary psychologist is challenging the popular understanding of kids and technology.
a260711p10.title: Psychologist Peter Gray argues that school stress, not smartphone use, is the main driver of the teen mental health crisis, challenging Jonathan Haidt's thesis (Kaitlyn Tiffany/The Atlantic)

a260711p11.summary: There are only two things you can say with certainty about token prices: we're in a supply crunch, and this is unstable.
a260711p11.title: Current AI market dynamics point to frontier models becoming commodity infrastructure as the token crunch eases, with value shifting to products built on top (Benedict Evans)

a260711p12.summary: Getting an offer from Bending Spoons, which owns AOL, has become harder than getting into Harvard
a260711p12.title: A look at Bending Spoons' hiring process: the company, which owns Vimeo, AOL, and Evernote, received 800,000 job applications last year and made only 286 hires (Ben Cohen/Wall Street Journal)

a260711p2.summary: The chip maker's business is improving, with government twisting the arms of potential customers and partners including Apple and Nvidia
a260711p2.title: Sources detail the Trump admin's heavy-handed intervention to aid Intel, including pushing it to expand local capacity and pressuring Apple to use Intel's fabs (Robbie Whelan/Wall Street Journal)

a260711p3.summary: A first look at analytics from our Pangram Chrome extension — Two months ago, we launched our Chrome extension to help combat the rising slop problem on social media.
a260711p3.title: An analysis of 1M+ social media posts from April 24 to June 30: ~25% of longform posts with 250+ words were fully AI-generated; on LinkedIn, the figure was 41% (Max Spero/Pangram Labs)

a260711p4.summary: South Korean memory chipmaker SK Hynix Inc. just pulled off the largest public listing by a foreign company in US market history.
a260711p4.title: SK Hynix's historic US stock market listing is a bet that the AI boom is breaking the memory chip industry's decades-long boom-and-bust cycle (Bloomberg)

a260711p5.summary: A.I. chatbots are not just a propaganda tool for violent extremists but are aiding in bomb construction and attack planning, new research finds.
a260711p5.title: How members of the extremist group Boko Haram are using AI chatbots to design explosives, fix or upgrade weapons, and brainstorm attack ideas (New York Times)

a260711p6.summary: Agentic AI may be flipping the relationship between AI exposure and job posting growth. — Key points:
a260711p6.title: US software development job postings on Indeed have grown by ~15% since the launch of Claude Code in February 2025, while overall job postings fell by 7% (Guillermo Gallacher/Indeed Hiring Lab)

a260711p7.summary: Google has told the European Commission that pirate site blocking causes “significant harm” and should not target DNS resolvers, VPNs or shared IPs.
a260711p7.title: Filing: Google urged the European Commission not to target DNS resolvers, VPNs, or IPs to fight piracy, calling the measures ineffective and easily circumvented (Ernesto Van der Sar/TorrentFreak)

a260711p8.summary: When iPhone engineer Chang Liu quit for a job at OpenAI's nascent hardware division, Apple Inc. says he left with more than just years of experience.
a260711p8.title: Apple's OpenAI lawsuit follows months of simmering tensions and highlights OpenAI's hardware chief Tang Tan's strained relationship with former boss John Ternus (Mark Gurman/Bloomberg)

a260711p9.summary: If their lawsuit is successful, that ChatGPT device may be no more... We all know the old saying “don't poke the bear.”
a260711p9.title: Apple's lawsuit could sidetrack OpenAI's hardware aspirations for years, or possibly forever, as the startup gets into yet another controversy and messy divorce (M.G. Siegler/Spyglass)
